textByHash.264b77fd70f2cbe72b45284484f340e5d14a52d4: Ever heard of criminals returning to the scene of the crime? Thats why.
textByHash.39c7d12fc23d7654f17df1b020c9110623718923: And you need me to give it to you?
textByHash.58adb688c8d4c42da827cf70964b13fb4612dec3: Well never say never. Now be on your way.
textByHash.5ab9e1c3b9d155ebd17d3125ae936fad9474851d: Take good care of that. It's very poweful.
textByHash.6b899c3ed3cbcc1627be8bed57463fe2d05ed7bb: You and I share a common friend.
textByHash.8368042df990ad16d96c74b0158ec93facde597f: You will need some space to hold it first.
textByHash.9978e3e23e75bd6de787f33bc5f664e90dab092b: Hello again. Azzanadra asked me to give you this.
textByHash.c79e2aee5e8a82aa55e9505a74ee0782a910269a: Not really. I like the peace and quiet. It's also a far more reasonable temperature than outside.
textByHash.e19310c893a90c789994aa236c077acfa79e7470: Very well, but it will cost you...
textByHash.ecf55d089a81fdd13e0acceaf7e07b13cdea62f6: And you need me to replace it?
